headline: Diamondback Energy Has Soared During the Iran War. Execs Made Millions on Stock Sales.
summary: INSIDE SCOOP   Diamondback Energy executives timed the run-up in their stock, selling millions worth of shares the day before shares hit a 52-week high. A handful of Diamondback executives including CEO Kaes Van’t Hof sold stock on March 6, according to filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission earlier this week.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Diamondback Energy, Raises Price Target to $248
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Mark Lear   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $215 to $248.
